stories.title: Belgian GP Race Day — Antonelli Starts From Pole, Championship Implications Huge

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Belgian GP day is here. 🏁

Kimi Antonelli starts from pole at Spa.
Verstappen P2. Russell P3. Hamilton P5.
Norris… P13 after his grid penalty.

Championship implications everywhere. 9:00 AM ET on ESPN.

#BelgianGP #F1 #Formula1

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Antonelli (179 pts) leads the championship AND starts on pole today.

Russell is 25 back. Hamilton 32 back.

If Antonelli wins Belgium, this title race could be over by August.

#BelgianGP #F1 #Formula1

stories.title: Norris P13 — Defending World Champion Faces Recovery Drive at Spa

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
The defending F1 world champion starts P13 today.

Lando Norris qualified P3 — then got a 10-place grid penalty.

McLaren chose Belgium specifically for this penalty. The overtaking opportunities at Spa are his best shot at damage control.

#BelgianGP #F1 #LandoNorris

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Norris on starting P13 at Spa: "Wait and see."

McLaren's strategy: survive Belgium, attack harder next race.

The reigning world champion playing catch-up all afternoon. 📺

#LandoNorris #BelgianGP #F1

article.headline: The Defending World Champion Starts P13: Norris's Damage-Limitation Mission at Spa

stories.title: Verstappen Exit Clause Active — Red Bull Future Officially In Doubt, McLaren Talks "In Final Stages"

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Verstappen's Red Bull exit clause is now officially active.

Mathematically impossible to reach P2 before the summer break. He has until October to pull the trigger.

McLaren talks: "closing stages." 👀

#F1 #Verstappen #Formula1

stories.title: Verstappen Signs McLaren Junior Van Langendonck — Unusual Move Amid Red Bull Uncertainty

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Verstappen just signed a McLaren junior driver to his personal management company.

He's also reportedly in final stages of talks to JOIN McLaren in 2027.

Make that make sense. 👀

#F1 #Verstappen #McLaren #Formula1

stories.title: Belgian GP Grid Chaos — Four Drivers Take Penalties, Alonso Starts Last

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Four penalties reshaped the Belgian GP grid:

🔴 Norris: -10 places (P13)
🔴 Stroll: -10 places (P20)
🔴 Hadjar: -10 places (P21)
🔴 Alonso: -20 places (P22 — LAST)

Seven cars. Zero clean starts. Spa chaos begins.

#BelgianGP #F1 #Formula1

article.headline: Four Drivers, Four Penalties: The Belgian GP Grid That Grid Penalties Built
